standard: hôm nay thấy hiếm cụ nhỉ , hồi đấy toàn vô Cầu Trỗi hái.

B: Want to go again? It's only been twice, after all.
C: Are we going again? But we've only gone twice!

standard: Kì dáng mi nhon mất từ khi nào không biết. Bây giờ đoạn thiếu đoạn thừa nhìn khiếp đảm
A: I don't know when she lost her slender figure. Now, she looks horrifying with her missing and excess parts.
B: I don't know when I lost my slim figure. Now, with some parts lacking and others excessive, it looks terrible.
C: My slender eyebrows disappeared at some point I can't remember. Now with missing patches and overgrown strands, they look absolutely horrifying.

standard: Chỗ nào Yên Thành thế này nhỉ?
A: Where in Yen Thanh is this place?
B: Where in Yen Thanh is this?
C: Where's this Yên Thành anyway?

standard: Ngồi đấy mà bình yên, ngồi tụm lại là nhao nhác như cái chợ.
A: Sitting there is peaceful, but gathering in groups makes it as chaotic as a marketplace.
B: Sit there and act peaceful, but as soon as you gather together, it's as chaotic as a market.
C: Sitting there peacefully, but when we gather it's chaotic like a market.

standard: đoạn này ngã tư giao nhau rộng lắm, mà chưa có đèn xanh đỏ cô à
A: This intersection is very wide, and there are no traffic lights yet, ma'am.
B: This intersection is very wide, but it doesn't have traffic lights yet, ma'am.
C: This intersection here is really wide, but there aren't any traffic lights yet, Auntie.

standard: tự nhiên lại bị thèm nhỉ.
A: I suddenly have this craving.
B: I suddenly have a craving.
C: Suddenly, I have a craving for it again.

standard: Tui khoái nhất vụ này này, nhớ lại vẫn thấy vui
A: This is my favorite part; I still feel happy remembering it.
B: I love this part the most; remembering it still makes me happy.
C: This is what I enjoyed the most, even thinking back on it still makes me happy

standard: Xã nào mà có sáu chị em gái, mấy cô chỉ được cái nói bậy, không ai nghe ai đâu
A: In a village with six sisters, all they do is talk nonsense; nobody listens to anyone else.
B: Which commune has six sisters, where the girls only know how to talk nonsense and no one listens to anyone else?
C: Which village has six sisters—these girls only know how to talk nonsense, nobody listens to anyone

standard: Vậy lỡ có bầu làm sao?
A: So what if she gets pregnant?
B: So what if I happen to get pregnant?
C: So what if she gets pregnant?

standard: Em bò đã không biết rồi, chứ nói gì đến bứt cỏ.
A: The cow didn't know how to do it, let alone pull up grass.
B: I didn't even know the cow existed, let alone that it was pulling up grass.
C: I can barely manage as it is, let alone pull out grass.

standard: Đi Hà Bội là đi đâu nhỉ?
A: Where exactly is Ha Boi?
B: Where exactly is Ha Boi?
C: Where is Hà Bội again?

standard: không có công an thì mình không biết ông giàu hơn mình, trời ơi!
A: If the police weren't around, I wouldn't have known he was richer than me, oh my God!
B: If it weren't for the police, I wouldn't have known he was richer than me, oh my god!
C: If it weren't for the police, I wouldn't have known he's richer than me, goodness!
